code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut has_prev = false
mut prev = 0
mut sorted = true
mut cur = ""

while i <= n
  let is_end = i == n
  let b = if is_end
    32
  else
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      32
    end
  end

  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(cur)
      match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(v)
        if has_prev
          if v < prev
            sorted = false
          end
        end
        prev = v
        has_prev = true
      when None
        sorted = sorted
      end
      cur = ""
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end

  i = i + 1
end

if sorted
  println("YES")
else
  println("NO")
end
